title: すみれSの後に・息切れの理由

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek finishes the race while still in poor
condition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon finishing the race, her health takes a turn
for the worse, and she collapses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A campus doctor gives her a quick examination
but is unable to determine the cause of her
illness, cautioning her to forgo the spring Classic
races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She weeps over not being able to deliver her
promised victories, and we tentatively set the fall
Kikuka Sho as her next goal.
